---
title: "Home"
toc: false
---

::: {.hero}
<p class="hero-name">Dong-Joon Yi</p>

<p class="hero-tagline">
Ph.D. candidate in Electronic Engineering at Hanyang University, working on quantitative defect spectroscopy and explainable AI for 2D materials and oxide semiconductors.
</p>

<div class="hero-meta">
  <span>SNLab, Advisor: Prof. Mun Seok Jeong</span>
  <a href="mailto:iver.ydj@gmail.com">iver.ydj@gmail.com</a>
  <a href="mailto:iverydj@hanyang.ac.kr">iverydj@hanyang.ac.kr</a>
</div>
:::

::: {.home-section}
## Research Interests

<div class="research-keywords">
  <span>Defect Spectroscopy</span>
  <span>DLTS / PICTS</span>
  <span>Raman / PL</span>
  <span>Tip-Enhanced Nanospectroscopy</span>
  <span>Explainable AI</span>
  <span>Oxide Semiconductors</span>
  <span>2D Materials</span>
  <span>FDTD Simulation</span>
</div>
:::

::: {.home-section}
## Links

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.co.kr/citations?user=MZE2mWsAAAAJ&hl=ko&oi=ao)
- [Dept. of Electronic Engineering, Hanyang University](https://ee.hanyang.ac.kr/)
- [CV (PDF)](assets/CV.pdf)
:::
